name: X-Golf Riverton
address: 13347 Teal Rdg Wy Suite N-105, Riverton, UT 84096
about: X-Golf Riverton is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Riverton, Utah. It features state-of-the-art simulators that combine camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide players with an accurate and realistic golfing experience. The venue offers various services including leagues, clinics, lessons, and event hosting, catering to all ages and skill levels. Pricing starts at $45 per hour for simulator time, with membership options also available.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to the world's best golf courses without leaving the city
State-of-the-art technology providing unparalleled accuracy and realism
Availability of leagues and competitions for all skill levels
PGA professional instruction for all ages
Convenient operating hours including late nights on Fridays and Saturdays

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food available (menu link provided), no outside food permitted
No mention of alcohol service; outside beverages not permitted

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available. It's recommended to bring your own clubs unless otherwise confirmed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are permitted. The venue offers its own food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Most groups complete their rounds in 2-3 hours, depending on the pace of play and ability level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, all ages are welcome during all business operating hours. The venue offers junior golf clinics and lessons led by a PGA professional.
